name: vitex agnus-castus
title: best benefits of vitex agnus-castus
description: Vitex agnus-castus regulates menstrual cycle by helping to normalize the frequency, duration, and intensity of menstrual periods. This benefit is important as it can help alleviate symptoms of menstrual irregularities, such as heavy bleeding, prolonged periods, and irregular ovulation, which can lead to decreased fertility, mood swings, and decreased quality of life.
